intro: Rosa olympica, also known as the Olympic rose, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, Rosaceae, native to the high mountains of Greece. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. The bioactive constituents of Rosa olympica include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and essential oils, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
